name: Karan Mehta
title: VP of Platform Engineering
bio: VP Platform Engineering at T-Mobile. DataStax Enterprise backs our subscriber data platform. 5G is tripling write throughput and our node count (and licensing bill) is scaling linearly.
pain_points: 5G subscriber growth tripling DataStax node count and licensing cost
Per-node licensing model becomes punishing at telco scale
Need Cassandra API compatibility — too many services to rewrite

name: Lin Zhao
title: Principal Database Architect
bio: Principal DB Architect at Comcast. Former DataStax Solutions Engineer — I know the product inside out. Now evaluating alternatives as our 2026 contract renewal approaches. Storage costs and compaction overhead are the main pain points.
pain_points: DataStax contract renewal is coming — costs have grown 3x since 2019
Compaction management consuming significant engineering cycles
Former DataStax SE: I know exactly where the product falls short

name: Priya Nair
title: Head of Infrastructure
bio: Head of Infrastructure at Nubank. We serve 90M+ customers across Latin America. Infrastructure cost efficiency is a board-level KPI. Cassandra underpins our core financial ledger.
pain_points: Infrastructure cost is a board-level KPI — every dollar of DataStax licensing is scrutinized
Latency SLAs tightening as we expand into Mexico and Colombia
DataStax contract growing faster than customer growth

name: Omar Al-Farsi
title: Staff Platform Engineer
bio: Staff Engineer on Netflix Storage Platform. Managing one of the world's largest Cassandra deployments. Published internally on C++ storage alternatives. Data volumes tripled post-pandemic.
pain_points: Operational burden of managing large Cassandra clusters is unsustainable at our scale
Compaction consuming disproportionate engineering effort
Evaluating C++ storage engines — JVM GC pauses are a known pain point

name: Jake Morrison
title: Senior Backend Engineer
bio: Senior Backend Engineer at eBay working on the listings and catalog real-time data platform. DataStax Cassandra backing 2B+ active listings. Peak load during Q4 is brutal.
pain_points: JVM GC pauses spiking during Q4 peak causing listing API latency
DataStax licensing cost scaling with listings volume growth

name: Fatima Al-Hassan
title: Database Engineer
bio: Database Engineer at Walmart Global Tech. DataStax Cassandra backing the real-time inventory platform for 500M+ SKUs. Black Friday every year is my reliability audit.
pain_points: Cassandra compaction storms during Black Friday degrading inventory read latency
DataStax node-based licensing makes peak-capacity planning expensive

name: Chen Wei
title: Senior Data Engineer
bio: Senior Data Engineer at Intuit on the real-time data platform behind TurboTax and QuickBooks. Cassandra at its limits every April. JVM heap tuning is a pre-tax-season ritual.
pain_points: JVM heap tuning required every March ahead of tax season filing peak
Write latency spikes during April filing crunch affecting user experience

name: Wei Zhang
title: Senior Infrastructure Engineer
bio: Senior Infrastructure Engineer at Grab. DataStax Cassandra powers ride-matching and payments across Southeast Asia. Cross-region latency is critical — 50ms delay means a lost booking.
pain_points: Cross-region latency adding 40-80ms to booking flows in Vietnam and Philippines
DataStax licensing growing with regional expansion

name: Tom Richards
title: Product Manager
bio: Product Manager at Stripe for the Payments Infrastructure team. Work closely with the backend engineers who operate our Cassandra clusters.

name: Aisha Patel
title: Data Analyst
bio: Data Analyst at Netflix. I query Cassandra daily through Presto for content performance analytics.

name: Ryan O'Brien
title: Junior Software Engineer
bio: Junior Software Engineer at Discord, 8 months in. Working on the messages backend which runs on Cassandra. Still getting familiar with the stack.

name: Emma Wilson
title: DevOps Engineer
bio: DevOps Engineer helping clients deploy and operate Cassandra on Kubernetes. Generalist ops background, not a DB specialist.

name: Jake Turner
title: Sales Development Representative
bio: SDR at DataStax. Prospecting into enterprise accounts.

name: Mia Chen
title: Marketing Specialist
bio: Marketing Specialist at Confluent running demand gen campaigns for Kafka Cloud.

name: Carlos Rivera
title: Customer Success Manager
bio: Customer Success Manager at DataStax managing 30 enterprise accounts.

name: Sophie Liu
title: Account Executive
bio: Account Executive at MongoDB selling Atlas into mid-market.

name: Ben Foster
title: Software Engineering Intern
bio: Summer intern at CloudBase. Working on a Cassandra-backed microservice as my project.

name: Rachel Kim
title: HR Generalist
bio: HR Generalist at Confluent supporting engineering teams with hiring and onboarding.

name: Daniel Park
title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
bio: Talent Acquisition Specialist at DataStax, focused on engineering roles.

name: Natalie Wong
title: Content Marketing Manager
bio: Content Marketing Manager at AWS writing about database services.
